message:
chore: bump workspace version to 0.2.0

Bump all 12 workspace crates from 0.1.1 to 0.2.0 for the v0.2.0 release.
All internal crate cross-references updated accordingly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
